ValidationRule.description:
Post-Judgment – Wage_Bank_Garnishment
Following fields become mandatory and remain editable Garnishment number Garnishment Date Garnishment Amount Number of payments
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( ISPICKVAL( Legal_Status__c ,'Post-Judgment'), OR( ISPICKVAL( Legal_Sub_Status__c ,'Wage Garnishment'), ISPICKVAL( Legal_Sub_Status__c ,'Bank Garnishment'), ISPICKVAL( Legal_Sub_Status__c ,'Writ & Garnishment') ), OR( ISBLANK( Garnishment_Number__c ), ISBLANK( Garnishment_Date__c ), ISBLANK( Garnishment_Amount__c ) ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Following fields are mandatory Garnishment number, Garnishment Date, Garnishment Amount, Number of payments
